hooks.command: bash -c 'BRANCH=$(git -C "$(pwd)" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$BRANCH" == "main" || "$BRANCH" == "develop" ]]; then echo "BLOQUE: Tu es sur la branche \"$BRANCH\". Cree une branche feature/* ou fix/* depuis develop avant d editer des fichiers. Commande : git checkout develop && git pull origin develop && git checkout -b feature/nom-feature"; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "npm install (react-native-|@react-native-)"; then echo "BLOQUE: Utilise npx expo install au lieu de npm install pour les packages React Native. Lance /check-package {nom} pour verifier la compatibilite Expo Go d abord."; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\", d.get(\"path\",\"\")))" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "frontend/src/.*\.(ts|tsx)$"; then cd /Users/jeotech/Desktop/projects/AquaCare/frontend && echo "--- TypeScript check ---" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 && echo "TypeScript OK: 0 erreurs" || echo "ERREURS TypeScript detectees ci-dessus — corriger avant de commiter"; fi'
